CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_array VALUES (1, [1, 2, 3]), (2, [0, 1, 2]), (3, [NULL, NULL, NULL]), (4, [5, 6, 7]), (5, []);
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 3;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 4;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 5;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x IS NOT NULL, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 3;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]) as first_greater_or_equal FROM (SELECT values FROM test_array WHERE id < 4);
SELECT t.id, arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 2 AND x <= 6, t.values) as valid_first FROM test_array t JOIN (SELECT 1 as id) j ON t.id = j.id;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x >= 10, [1, 5, 8, 12, NULL]) AS result_with_no_matches;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x > 0, values) FROM (SELECT arrayConcat(values, [10, 20]) AS values FROM test_array WHERE id = 1);
